topStories.title: Kerala polls: K.C. Venugopal says UDF to move ECI against Rajeev Chandrasekhar over ‘concealed assets’
topStories.description: Congress leader alleges poll affidavit violation by Kerala BJP president; accuses CPI(M) of bar licence graft and slams Centre, State over price rise and farmer distress

topStories.title: US-Israel war on Iran: What’s happening on day 26 of attacks?
topStories.description: Iran, Israel, the Gulf faced new missiles and drones. The US has signalled military escalation and openness to a deal.

topStories.title: All-party meeting LIVE updates: Rahul Gandhi to skip key 5pm meet called by govt over Iran war
topStories.description: All-party meeting LIVE: Leader of Opposition in the Lok Sabha and Congress MP will reportedly be skipping an all-party meeting the government has called today over the West Asia conflict sparked by US-Iran war.

topStories.title: JD Vance over Trump's son-in-law: Why Iran wants US Veep for talks to end war
topStories.description: JD Vance over Trumps soninlaw Why Iran wants US Veep for talks to end war

topStories.title: Congress gets notice to vacate 24 Akbar Road office completely by March 28: Report
topStories.description: The Congress party has been ordered to vacate its long-standing headquarters at 24 Akbar Road by March 28, marking the end of an era. This follows the relocation of its national office to Indira Bhawan, a move rooted in its historical journey since 1978.

topStories.title: US Airline Unveils Relax Row Seats That Convert Into Couch: Know How It Works
topStories.description: These new dedicated rows of 3 seats will feature adjustable leg rests that will fold up at a 90-degree angle to create more room to sleep or stretch.

topStories.title: Quote of the day: Tom Hanks on resilience — ‘This too shall pass’
topStories.description: Tom Hanks embodies a steady presence in Hollywood, emphasizing the temporary nature of both success and failure. His wisdom encourages resilience and a grounded perspective, which is vital in high-pressure environments, reminding us that emotional extremes will pass.

topStories.title: Iran claims US, Israel hit Bushehr nuclear plant— What's the strategic importance of the facility? | Explained
topStories.description: Iran war: The IAEA reported no damage from a projectile strike at Bushehr nuclear plant, which operates at low capacity yet is crucial to Iran's energy supply.

topStories.title: SC refuses to review ruling on solatium, interest to landowners retrospectively
topStories.description: The Supreme Court issued crucial clarifications and a cut-off date to balance landowners’ rights with the principle of finality in litigation

topStories.description: Trump has described the Gulf as ''an area of only marginal significance to the United States for its oil supplies, but one upon which Japan and others are almost totally dependent.''

dailyNews.title: Iran’s new security boss Mohammad Zolghadr: Why his appointment matters
dailyNews.description: Zolghadr, an ex-IRGC commander, will manage Iran's security amid external US-Israeli pressures and internal unrest.

dailyNews.title: Amid US-Israeli attacks, people in Iran struggle to survive ailing economy
dailyNews.description: Some are left without an income, others are temporarily displaced, and no one knows when the internet will return .

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court-appointed panel asks Centre to withdraw Transgender Bill that removes right to gender self-determination
dailyNews.description: The Committee also called for widespread community consultation before any further amendments are brought to the 2019 law

dailyNews.description: Oil falls more than 5%, Asian shares gain over Trump's talk of Iran negotiations

dailyNews.title: Himanta's allegations linking me to Pakistan wild theory existing in his head: Gaurav Gogoi
dailyNews.description: What we are saying about his family, his wealth, corruption, and the benefit that the government machinery is giving to his wife’s company — that is for everybody to see, claimed Assam Congress President Gaurav Gogoi

dailyNews.title: From Strait of Hormuz to Iran's nuclear programme and US sanctions — What we know of Trump's 15-point ceasefire plan
dailyNews.description: News of the 15-point plan sent by the Trump administration comes a couple of days after the US President promised to hold off on strikes against Iran's energy infrastructure, citing ‘very good and productive’ talks with Tehran.

dailyNews.title: New Zealand footballers willing to play Iran World Cup match outside US
dailyNews.description: The teams are set to play on June 15 in Los Angeles, but Iran has threatened to boycott its matches due to the war.

dailyNews.title: 'Negotiating with yourselves?': Iranian military mocks Trump's claim - Business Standard
dailyNews.description: 'Negotiating with yourselves?': Iranian military mocks Trump's claim  Business Standard

dailyNews.title: US jury orders Meta to pay $375m for endangering children
dailyNews.description: The verdict marks the first time a US state has successfully sued the social media giant over child safety issues.

dailyNews.title: What we know about the US’s 15-point plan Iran proposal
dailyNews.description: US media reports the Trump administration has proposed a temporary ceasefire and a 15-point plan to end the war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: US to send thousands of soldiers from 82nd Airborne Division to Middle East
dailyNews.description: The US is expected to deploy up to 3,000 troops from the 82nd Airborne Division to the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: Sagility shares rocket 8% after Nomura initiates coverage with buy rating, sees it as top AI beneficiary
dailyNews.description: Sagility share price surged 8% after Nomura initiated coverage with a Buy rating and a Rs 55 target price. The brokerage sees Sagility benefiting from AI in healthcare. The company serves US health insurance firms and hospitals. Institutional investors have increased their stakes. Sagility's stock has seen a decline recently.

dailyNews.title: Chicago activist torches Dem crime policies after Loyola student's murder: 'How much more can we take?'
dailyNews.description: Chicago activist P-Rae Easley pleaded with President Donald Trump to save Chicago after Loyola University student Sheridan Gorman was allegedly killed by an illegal immigrant.

dailyNews.title: Upcoming book reveals Trump admired Queen Elizabeth for being the 'opposite of me' in one key diplomatic skill
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump recalls being dazzled by Queen Elizabeth II's diplomatic tact in "The Queen and Her Presidents," saying her refusal to criticize anyone was "genius."

dailyNews.title: President Trump to deploy more than 1,000 additional troops
dailyNews.description: Sources tell NBC News that President Trump will send more than an additional 1,000 soldiers from the 82nd Airborne to the Middle East. NBC News’ Chief Foreign Correspondent Richard Engel reports.

dailyNews.title: Democrat flips Republican-held Florida state House district that includes Trump’s Mar-a-Lago
dailyNews.description: Democrat Emily Gregory won a special election Tuesday for the Florida state House district that includes President Donald Trump’s Mar-a-Lago resort, flipping the seat from Republican control, The Associated Press projects

dailyNews.title: Senate Republicans optimistic about potential deal to fund TSA
dailyNews.description: There’s a potential deal in the works to re-open the Department of Homeland Security, according to four sources familiar with the negotiations between Congress and the White House. NBC News’ Tom Costello reports.

dailyNews.title: Markwayne Mullin sworn in to serve as Homeland Security Secretary
dailyNews.description: President Trump held a swearing-in ceremony for the Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin at the White House. Mullin pledged to "fight every single day" to protect the homeland and commented on the ongoing partial government shutdown.

dailyNews.title: Iran war grinds on with Pentagon expected to send more troops to Middle East
dailyNews.description: President Trump said several members of his administration were involved in talks with Iran about the ongoing war.

dailyNews.title: We asked every lawmaker in Congress what they're doing to end the DHS shutdown
dailyNews.description: Lawmakers and President Trump appear to be edging closer to a framework to wrap up the Department of Homeland Security shutdown — but a breakthrough has remained out of reach. CBS News contacted every House and Senate office to ask what they're doing to end the shutdown.

dailyNews.title: 3/24: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: Trump says Vance and Rubio are involved in talks with Iran; Senate inches toward a potential DHS funding solution.

dailyNews.title: Democrat flips Florida state legislative district that includes Mar-a-Lago
dailyNews.description: Democrat Emily Gregory won a special election for a Florida state House seat on Tuesday, flipping a district that is home to President Trump's estate, Mar-a-Lago.

dailyNews.title: Senate rejects latest push to rein in Trump's powers in Iran as war's off-ramp unclear
dailyNews.description: Democrats have vowed to keep forcing votes on the issue as they seek public testimony from administration officials.

dailyNews.title: Oil trades surged before Trump's Iran post. Some experts are suspicious.
dailyNews.description: Trading in crude oil futures spiked only minutes before President Trump postponed an ultimatum on Iran, causing oil prices to drop and stocks to surge.
